mappingPolicy.Daniel 3:1-23: direct chapter:verse comparison before Prayer/Song insertion
mappingPolicy.Daniel 3:24-30: compare canonical Daniel 3:24-30 to active Greek Daniel 3:91-97 after Prayer/Song insertion

claim: Active Greek Daniel ordinary chapters 1-12 are internally consistent with canonical Daniel NRSV under the Greek Daniel insertion mapping.
limitations: This does not verify Prayer of Azariah/Song of the Three Jews.
This does not verify Bel and the Dragon.
This does not bind an external NRSV source witness for the additions.
This does not promote all Greek Daniel or deuterocanon trust.
nextRequiredWork: Extract or bind NRSV source witnesses for Prayer of Azariah/Song of the Three Jews, Susanna, and Bel and the Dragon.
Acquire or bind NRSV/NRSVA Greek Esther source witness.
Run exact source collation for remaining Greek addition material only after source binding.
